package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for request_logging_fields_assembled_differently_across_handlers: Inconsistent request-log field sets across the same API module.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule143NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule143NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule143NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario143Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule143NegativeService, input Rule143NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
